description: Style NoteThis summer is the season for fusion wear and bright hues, and creations by mineral embody these warm weather trends. These pieces are perfect for the contemporary woman who knows how to make heads turn without loosing her cool. Product DescriptionTurquoise flared top with round neckline, sleeveless, tucks in front, elasticated smocking at back, net binding at neckline and armhole, godet panels with net overlaysMaterial and CareCotton blendMachine wash warmDo not bleachUse warm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33”) is wearing a size M
